results.description:
Reentrancy in SherX.harvestFor(address,ILock) (contracts/facets/SherX.sol#249-257):
	External calls:
	- doYield(_token,_user,_user,0) (contracts/facets/SherX.sol#254)
		- ps.lockToken.mint(_receiver,lock) (contracts/libraries/LibPool.sol#81)
		- LibPool.stake(psSherX,withdrawable_amount,from) (contracts/facets/SherX.sol#344)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Harvest(_user,_token) (contracts/facets/SherX.sol#256)
results.markdown:
Reentrancy in [SherX.harvestFor(address,ILock)](contracts/facets/SherX.sol#L249-L257):
	External calls:
	- [doYield(_token,_user,_user,0)](contracts/facets/SherX.sol#L254)
		- [ps.lockToken.mint(_receiver,lock)](contracts/libraries/LibPool.sol#L81)
		- [LibPool.stake(psSherX,withdrawable_amount,from)](contracts/facets/SherX.sol#L344)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Harvest(_user,_token)](contracts/facets/SherX.sol#L256)

	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride

	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
